title: selaginella trichoclada
intro: Selaginella trichoclada, also known as the spike moss or spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella trichoclada include its potential to treat respiratory issues, skin problems, and wounds, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Selaginella trichoclada are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and poultices for topical application.
